data.text: ALTHOUGH SKINNYMON DID NOT NAME THE STAR SKINNYMON, I BELIEVE WHOEVER
NAMED IT WANTED IT TO BE A REMOTE PLACE. AS A RESULT, THE VIMANA
JUMPS BETWEEN TO SPUR STATIONS WILL NOW INCREASE, MAKING USING THE
'ST' MODULE JUST ABOUT IMPOSSIBLE FOR REGULAR MK 4 STARDRIFTERS.
THIS IS NOT A PLOY TO CONCEAL MY LAZINESS. REALLY.
